untranslatable_reason: This signal requires advanced quantitative inputs not available in the allowed indicator set: (1) Theoretical spread calculation across multiple correlated instruments (requires multi-leg instrument data and pricing models), (2) Correlation coefficient measurement with external factors like interest rates (requires external data feed and correlation computation), (3) Regression-based hedge ratio calculation (requires statistical modeling beyond price/volume indicators), (4) Regime shift detection in external factors (interest rate data not available). The signal fundamentally requires a multi-asset derivatives framework with external macroeconomic data integration, which cannot be expressed using single-instrument price-based indicators alone.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_61 describes a statistical arbitrage / pairs trading strategy with cross-asset hedging. While the source text references index spread trading (S&P vs NYSE), the generic rule requires correlation analysis, regression modeling, and external variable monitoring. Standard backtesting indicators are insufficient. Implementation would require: (1) Custom correlation/cointegration modules, (2) Multi-leg position tracking, (3) External data feeds (interest rates), (4) Dynamic hedge ratio rebalancing logic. This is a research-grade strategy requiring custom infrastructure beyond indicator-based rules.
